name: Lapulapu

skills.name: Sea Beast's Favor
skills.description: Increases the Physical and Magical Defense of himself and the teammate with the lowest Health nearby.

skills.name: Torrential Blade
skills.description: Damages and slows enemies within range.

skills.name: Island's Blessing
skills.description: Dashes in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in his path and launching them.

skills.name: Raging Sea
skills.description: Splits the earth, damaging enemies within range and launching them. The fractured earth damages and slows enemies.

skillsZh.name: 海獸的認可
skillsZh.description: 拉普拉普為自身和附近血量最少的友方英雄強化雙防。

skillsZh.name: 驚濤之刃
skillsZh.description: 拉普拉普對範圍內敵人造成傷害和減速。

skillsZh.name: 海島之祝
skillsZh.description: 拉普拉普朝指定方向位移，對路徑上的敵人造成傷害和擊飛。

skillsZh.name: 浪起雲湧
skillsZh.description: 拉普拉普劈開大地，對範圍內敵人造成傷害和擊飛。劈開後的大地持續對敵人造成傷害和減速。

tips: Build: Boots of Fortitude, Guardian - Radiance, Ominous Premonition.
tipsZh: 拉普拉普（遊走）：梯度 B，勝率 55.15%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：影忍之足、近衛・形昭、不祥徵兆.

faqs.question: Is Lapulapu good in current season?
faqs.answer: Lapulapu is Tier B Tank with 55.15% win rate, 0.37% pick rate, and 0.02% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Lapulapu build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Boots of Fortitude, Guardian - Radiance, Ominous Premonition, Succubus Cloak, Frigid Charge, Overlord's Platemail.

faqs.question: How to counter Lapulapu?
faqs.answer: Pick Wukong, Musashi, Ying. Strong into Meng Ya, Luara, Garo.

faqsZh.question: 拉普拉普 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 拉普拉普 為 B 梯度，勝率 55.15%、選取 0.37%、禁用 0.02%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 拉普拉普 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：影忍之足、近衛・形昭、不祥徵兆、魔女斗篷、冰霜衝擊、霸者重裝.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 拉普拉普？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Wukong、Musashi、Ying。拉普拉普 克制 Meng Ya、Luara、Garo。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Meng Ya, Luara, Garo. Weak into: Wukong, Musashi, Ying.
metaAnalysisZh: 拉普拉普 勝率 55.15%（Camp HOK，2026-07-20）

guide.overview: Lapulapu is a Easy Tank (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 55.3% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Lapulapu: Enhance Increases the Physical and Magical Defense of himself and the teammate with the lowest Health nearby.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Knowledge Gem, Boots of Resistance, Guardian, then complete Glacial Buckler, Longnight Guardian, Guardian - Redemption. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate, Harmony, Vacuity for stats that match Lapulapu's Tank kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Torrential Blade → Island's Blessing → Raging Sea → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Raging Sea (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Torrential Blade, and Raging Sea on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Torrential Blade → Island's Blessing → Raging Sea → weave basic attacks

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Lapulapu sits at Tier B globally (55.3% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Lapulapu vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Lapulapu has +3.9% WR vs Kaizer in Camp data. Choose Lapulapu when you need Roaming identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.
Lapulapu vs Dun (Tank, Tier S): Dun is 1.5% pick / 52.3% WR. Lapulapu has +3.0% WR vs Dun in Camp data. Choose Lapulapu when you need Roaming identity; choose Dun for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Lapulapu excels into Meng Ya, Luara, Garo. Avoid blind picking into Wukong, Musashi, Ying without team peel.
